title: Responsive Modernize Brief
description: FUTURE-N marker for /responsive-modernize. Drop into project root as .responsive-modernize.json. Walker finds nearest one in cwd or parents.

target.description: What to audit. URL preferred; src/html for static-only scan.

url.description: Running dev URL — required for baseline/diagnose/verify phases

routes.description: Routes to test (joined with url). Default ['/']

src.description: Glob patterns for CSS/component scan. Default ['**/*.{css,scss}']

html.description: Glob patterns for HTML scan. Default ['**/*.html']

framework.description: Optional hint — adjusts which output dirs to scan

viewports.description: Viewport profile IDs from viewports.json. null = use defaults (6 profiles)

engines.description: Browser engines. Default ['chromium']. --deep adds webkit + firefox.

thresholds.description: Hard limits — issues above these = error severity

diff_px_pct_max.description: Verify phase: max acceptable pixel diff per viewport

i18n.description: Test multiple locales — catches text-overflow class (Slovenian ~30% longer)

rtl.description: Add a dir=rtl pass in baseline + diagnose — catches LTR-only physical-property layouts (left/right vs inline-start/inline-end).

forcedColors.description: Add a forced-colors: active emulation pass — Windows High Contrast Mode.

colorSchemes.description: Color schemes to baseline. Default ['light']. --deep adds 'dark'.

networkThrottle.description: Network throttling for perf-gate phase. Default 'off'. 'slow3g' = 400kbps + 400ms latency.

dismissCookieBanner.description: Auto-click cookie consent buttons in baseline phase (recognises EN+SI common patterns). Default true.

flowSimulation.description: Optional headless flow simulation — sequence of actions to perform before screenshot.
